allow: Bash(powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Stop-Process -Name ''文件分析管理器'' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Remove-Item -Path ''d:/jiangweipeng/trae_code/file_analyzer/dist'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item -Path ''d:/jiangweipeng/trae_code/file_analyzer/build'' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")

Bash(cp "d:/jiangweipeng/trae_code/file_analyzer/dist/文件分析管理器/_internal/torch/lib/"*.dll "d:/jiangweipeng/trae_code/file_analyzer/dist/文件分析管理器/_internal/")
